# link-chip

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Inline, clickable navigational chip — a clickable Badge with link coloring (bg-muted + text-primary, hover underline), baseline-aligned for inline-in-text use, with optional leading icon and monospace label.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/badge.Badge`
  - Exports: Types: `LinkChipProps`; Values: `LinkChip`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `active-data/attempt`, `active-data/conv`, `active-data/plugin-link`, `active-data/task`, `active-data/task-link`, `apps/studio/compositions`, `apps/studio/compositions/auto-serve`, `apps/studio/compositions/release/release-artifact`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call/add-task`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call/skill`, `conversations/conversation-view/markdown-extensions`, `debug/op-rate`, `debug/slow-ops`, `debug/slow-ops/pane`, `debug/stall-monitor`, `page/inline-date`, `page/inline-page-link`, `page/read-only-view`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view/inclusion`, `primitives/file-links`
